title: Lead Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead Business Development Manager at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd!
